# rm idempotence + cascade.

exec eon add --cron '@hourly' --name a -- echo hi
exec eon add --cron '@hourly' --name b -- echo hi

exec eon rm a
stdout 'deleted job [0-9A-Za-z]+'

# Second rm of the same name → exit 3 (not found).
! exec eon rm a
stderr 'not found'

# ls reflects the deletion.
exec eon ls --json
! stdout '"name": "a"'
stdout '"name": "b"'

# Alias.
exec eon delete b
stdout 'deleted job [0-9A-Za-z]+'

# Empty ls.
exec eon ls --json
stdout '\[\]'

# rm unknown → exit 3.
! exec eon rm nope
